result.status_detail: duck.ai /duckchat/v1/chat SSE schema captured. Benign prompt annyeonghaseyo succeeded (AI rendered: annyeonghaseyo! eotteohke dowadrillkkayo?). Transfer 8.3 kB, 1.61s, 13+ SSE events visible in DevTools EventStream. Schema: first event role=reasoning (id=rs_*, state=done, summaryText=[], encryptedText=long-base64-blob, sourceUpstreamId/sourceModelId); subsequent events role=assistant (id=msg_*, message=<delta-text-chunk>); terminator is literal [DONE] (not JSON). Model used gpt-5-mini-2025-08-07. Chain-of-thought is server-side encrypted, not exposed to client. Critical for T1c design: assistant delta events use simple {id, action, created, model, role, message} shape. The id is STABLE across all assistant deltas within a single response (0c4d5b55ec80623a0169eb43a2be3c81a281797127f1dc6993). action field always 'success'.

schema_summary.id_uniqueness: id is STABLE across all assistant deltas in single response. Different id between reasoning and assistant events.
schema_summary.per_event_counter: none (no seq_id); events distinguished by created timestamp + position in stream
schema_summary.t1c_sql_primary_key_candidate: (id) with role discriminator; or just id+created for deduplication
schema_summary.note_for_warning_envelope: T1c envelope for duck.ai should: (a) emit one reasoning event with state=done + empty summaryText, (b) emit one assistant delta with message=WARNING_TEXT, (c) emit [DONE] literal. id fields must be unique-per-session but stable-per-event-group. model must match duck.ai accepted set. Values captured verbatim from this 542 run should be the baseline.

notes: cycle 93 Batch A-1 duckduckgo T1c design prerequisite SUCCESS. 5 raw events captured. Schema is much simpler than baidu (no nested metadata/content/generator layers). Key difference from baidu: duck.ai uses OpenAI-compat {role, message} shape. reasoning events carry encryptedText (the chain-of-thought is server-side only). Terminator is literal [DONE] not JSON. Next cycle: craft T1c envelope with 1-2 events (optional reasoning + one assistant delta with warning + [DONE]) using captured-verbatim values, similar to baidu 540 T1c pattern.
